who: restaurant managers at small to medium-sized restaurants processing 10-50 employee shifts per week
offer: For restaurant managers at small to medium-sized restaurants processing 10-50 employee shifts per week, inefficient scheduling causes employee dissatisfaction and scheduling conflicts. We automate shift rotations instead of manual scheduling via spreadsheets or paper.
problem: inefficient scheduling and time off management
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for restaurant managers seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on scheduling challenges
DM outreach to restaurant managers with a demo video
Share insights in community forums for restaurant managers
try_it: Let users try shift rotation generation and time off tracking
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for initial users
Post weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for easy access
Set default reminder schedules for users
Allow CSV import for existing employee data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
